title: Home Screen - Onboarding in not displayed over DFU screens after connecting new device
scenario: Onboarding dialog is not displayed over DFU screens after connecting a new device during firmware update
steps: Start the app with a device and begin DFU process.
Pair a new device that supports onboarding (Emu, Tern, Osprey) in phone settings.
Check the app - it remains at the DFU screen and onboarding for the newly connected device is NOT displayed.
Wait for DFU to finish and click Close.
expected: After returning to the Home screen, the Onboarding dialog should be present.
